nodes.name: Agent: Split Chunks
nodes.notes:
POST analyst:8001/split-chunks
Splits document into 10K word chunks

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'Từ đoạn văn dưới đây, trích xuất cấu trúc. KHÔNG tóm tắt. CHỈ liệt kê.

Trả về JSON:
{
  "headings": ["Tiêu đề chính"],
  "topics": ["Chủ đề A", "Chủ đề B"],
  "key_entities": ["Tên riêng", "Năm", "Sự kiện"],
  "content_type": "narrative|data|argument|mixed",
  "position_hint": "intro|body|conclusion"
}

Đoạn văn (chunk ' + $json.chunk_index + '/' + $json.total_chunks + '):
' + $json.chunk_text }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

nodes.name: LLM: Extract Metadata
nodes.notes:
Gemini Flash: Extract headings, topics, entities
Credential: HTTP Query Auth (key=GEMINI_API_KEY)

nodes.name: Agent: Merge Metadata
nodes.notes:
POST analyst:8001/merge-metadata
Combine metadata from all chunks

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'Từ danh sách metadata các chunks dưới đây, hãy:
1. Tạo outline cho slide presentation
2. Map mỗi section tới chunk_ids chứa nội dung liên quan

Trả về JSON:
{
  "outline": [{"section_id": 0, "title": "...", "slides": 2, "key_points": ["..."]}],
  "chunk_mapping": {"0": [0], "1": [1,2], "2": [3,4]},
  "total_slides": 15,
  "topic": "...",
  "language": "vi",
  "context": "general|vietnam_history|tech|business",
  "theme_suggestion": "midnight"
}

User prompt: ' + $json.prompt + '

Merged metadata:
' + JSON.stringify($json.merged_metadata) }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

nodes.name: LLM: Create Outline + Mapping
nodes.notes:
Gemini Flash: Create structured outline
+ map sections to chunk IDs

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'Từ prompt sau, hãy tạo outline cho presentation.

Trả về JSON:
{
  "outline": [{"section_id": 0, "title": "...", "slides": 2, "key_points": ["..."]}],
  "chunk_mapping": {},
  "total_slides": 10,
  "topic": "...",
  "language": "vi",
  "context": "general",
  "theme_suggestion": "midnight"
}

User prompt: ' + $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.5, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

nodes.name: LLM: Direct Outline
nodes.notes:
For ≤10K words or prompt-only:
Direct outline generation in 1 call
